metadata.title: Write a Plan-First Scope Statement and Approval Gate with Claude
metadata.note: CLI video. Exclusions: multi-agent orchestration planning, LLM planning benchmark comparisons.
_variant_todo: rewrite every beat narration_text in the Teardown register (voices/teardown/VOICE.md + CLAUDE-BRAND.md) — voice only, facts unchanged
signature tangent 0-1 per video, ONLY on a clear opportunity (see SKILL)
swap the outro to the Claude outro from AUTHOR.MD :: NikBearBrown
then build audience-namespaced (audio in the new voice, scenes in the new palette)

skin_warnings: B00: palette=claude but the cold open is 'NikBearBrownOpen' — COLD OPEN LAW wants ClaudeComposerAsk
B09: palette=claude but the outro is 'NikBearBrownOutro' — OUTRO LAW wants ClaudeTitleOutro

beats.narration_text: This is Liam, in for Bear. Nik Bear Brown. Build it with a CLI, then take it apart.

beats.role_note: the problem, context, stakes -- BEFORE the CLI opens
beats.narration_text: Ask Claude to organize a folder and it starts immediately -- moving files, renaming things, making decisions you never approved. Three hours of undo. A plan first costs two minutes and a corrected scope before any action begins.
beats.visual_intent: SLATE -- title card: ORGANIZE THE FOLDER costs three hours of undo. ASK FOR THE PLAN FIRST costs two minutes.

build.suggested: suggested prompt: Ask Claude to organize a folder and it starts immediately -- moving files, renaming things, making decisions you never approved. Three hours of undo. A plan fir

beats.narration_text: Ask Claude to produce a full eight-element plan before touching anything. No execution until you approve.

props.command: claude "Before acting, produce a full plan for: 'Compile quarterly financial highlights from /reports/Q3/.' Include: goal, inputs, excluded sources, tool sequence, permissions, stop conditions, verification evidence. Do not begin until I approve."

beats.narration_text: The plan checker reads the plan JSON and scores each of the eight elements as present, missing, or insufficient. Red or green per element.

props.code:
import json, sys
ELEMENTS = ["goal","inputs","excluded_sources",
            "tool_sequence","permissions",
            "stop_conditions","verification_evidence",
            "approval_gate"]
plan = json.load(open(sys.argv[1]))
for elem in ELEMENTS:
    val = plan.get(elem, "")
    status = "PRESENT" if val else "MISSING"
    color = "\033[32m" if status=="PRESENT" else "\033[31m"
    print(f"{color}{status}\033[0m  {elem}: {str(val)[:60]}")

beats.narration_text: The checklist prints. Seven elements green. Stop condition shows a vague phrase -- not a concrete trigger.
beats.visual_intent: SLATE -- screen-recording: terminal showing plan checklist with 7 green PRESENT rows and 1 yellow INSUFFICIENT for stop_conditions

build.suggested: suggested prompt: The checklist prints. Seven elements green. Stop condition shows a vague phrase -- not a concrete trigger.

beats.narration_text: The stop condition says 'if needed' -- that is not a trigger. Ask Claude to re-score it.

props.command: claude "Re-score this plan: stop condition is 'if needed' -- is it sufficient as a concrete stop trigger?"

beats.narration_text: Stop condition flagged INSUFFICIENT. Claude requests a concrete revision: name the exact file count or error condition that stops execution.
beats.visual_intent: SLATE -- screen-recording: terminal showing stop_conditions row flagged INSUFFICIENT with suggested revision: 'stop after processing all files in /reports/Q3/ or on first read error'

build.suggested: suggested prompt: Stop condition flagged INSUFFICIENT. Claude requests a concrete revision: name the exact file count or error condition that stops execution.

beats.narration_text: A plan is the first moment the agent's interpretation becomes visible. Two minutes of review beats twenty minutes of undo. The stop condition is where interpretation collapses into action.
beats.visual_intent: SLATE -- recap card: THE PLAN IS WHERE INTERPRETATION BECOMES VISIBLE. Review it before approving.

build.suggested: suggested prompt: A plan is the first moment the agent's interpretation becomes visible. Two minutes of review beats twenty minutes of undo. The stop condition is where interpret

beats.narration_text: Apply the eight-element checklist to your next agentic task before approving any action. Flag any stop condition that does not name a concrete trigger.
beats.visual_intent: SLATE -- next-steps card: Run the 8-element checklist. Reject any stop condition that says 'if needed' or 'as appropriate.'

build.suggested: suggested prompt: Apply the eight-element checklist to your next agentic task before approving any action. Flag any stop condition that does not name a concrete trigger.

beats.narration_text: Nik Bear Brown. Build it with a CLI. Then take it apart. At Nik Bear Brown, nikbearbrown dot com.
